Despite common clinical understanding that the master apical file is the final instrumental size used to shape the root canal and establish working length, none of the given answer choices are explicitly supported by the documented information.

Final Answer: \boxed{\text{No valid choice}} — however, within constraints, Option A remains closest to accepted practice although unsupported empirically.
